description: Ensure process builder phase headline, description, and additional info are displayed on the decision process screen as promised by their subtitle text

userStories.title: Pass phase content props through DecisionStateRouter to StandardDecisionPage
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the current phase's headline, description, and additionalInfo to be extracted in DecisionStateRouterNew and passed as props to StandardDecisionPage so the page can display them.
acceptanceCriteria: In DecisionStateRouterNew (apps/app/src/components/decisions/DecisionStateRouter.tsx), derive currentPhase from instance.instanceData.phases using instance.instanceData.currentPhaseId
Extract currentPhase.headline, currentPhase.description, and currentPhase.additionalInfo
Pass phaseHeadline, phaseDescription, and phaseAdditionalInfo as new optional props to StandardDecisionPage
StandardDecisionPage type signature accepts phaseHeadline?: string, phaseDescription?: string, phaseAdditionalInfo?: string
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Display phase headline and description in DecisionHero on StandardDecisionPage
userStories.description: As a process participant, I want to see the phase-specific headline as the page header and description below it on StandardDecisionPage, so the process builder content appears as promised.
acceptanceCriteria: In StandardDecisionPage, if phaseHeadline prop is set, use it as the DecisionHero title instead of the existing slug-based hardcoded content

In StandardDecisionPage, if phaseDescription prop is set, use it as the DecisionHero description (as a

element) instead of the existing slug-based hardcoded content
Existing slug-based content for people-powered, cowop, one-project, and default fallback still renders when no phase overrides are provided
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Display phase additionalInfo in About the process modal on StandardDecisionPage
userStories.description: As a process participant, I want to see phase-specific additional information when I click About the process, so the content promised by the process builder subtitle appears.
acceptanceCriteria: In StandardDecisionPage, pass phaseAdditionalInfo ?? description as the description prop to DecisionActionBar
When phaseAdditionalInfo is set, the About the process modal shows the phase additionalInfo content
When phaseAdditionalInfo is not set, the About the process modal continues to show the instance-level description (existing behavior)
The About the process button only appears when there is content (existing behavior preserved)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Display phase headline, description, and additionalInfo on VotingPage
userStories.description: As a process participant in a voting phase, I want the same phase-based content overrides to apply so I see the correct phase headline, description, and About the process content.
acceptanceCriteria: In VotingPage (apps/app/src/components/decisions/pages/VotingPage.tsx), derive currentPhase from instance.instanceData.phases and instance.instanceData.currentPhaseId
If currentPhase.headline is set, use it as the DecisionHero title instead of the existing slug-based content
If currentPhase.description is set, use it as the DecisionHero description instead of the existing slug-based content
Pass currentPhase.additionalInfo ?? description as the description prop to DecisionActionBar
Existing org-specific fallback content (people-powered, cowop, one-project) still renders when no phase overrides are set
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: CodeRabbit review of all changes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the implementation reviewed by CodeRabbit to catch any issues before merging.
acceptanceCriteria: Run the coderabbit-review skill on this branch after all previous stories are complete
Any blocking issues raised by CodeRabbit are addressed
